vulnerabilities.title: Cross-Site Scripting in node-red
vulnerabilities.description:
Versions of `node-red` prior to 0.20.8are vulnerable to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The package fails to sanitize the `name` field in new Flows, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's browser.


## Recommendation

Upgrade to version 0.18.6 or later.

vulnerabilities.title: Cross-Site Scripting in node-red
vulnerabilities.description:
Versions of `node-red` prior to 0.18.6 are vulnerable to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The package fails to sanitize the `name` field in new items, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's browser.


## Recommendation

Upgrade to version 0.18.6 or later.
